achievements.title: First Ink
achievements.description: Defeat your first creature.

achievements.title: Swarm Sweeper
achievements.description: Defeat 100 creatures (lifetime).

achievements.title: Trench Cleaner
achievements.description: Defeat 500 creatures (lifetime).

achievements.title: Ink Demon
achievements.description: Defeat 1,000 creatures (lifetime). Unlocks the Ink Demon skin.

achievements.title: Abyssal Annihilator
achievements.description: Defeat 5,000 creatures (lifetime).

achievements.title: Frenzy
achievements.description: Reach a 50 combo. Unlocks the Crimson Wake.

achievements.title: Maelstrom
achievements.description: Reach a 100 combo.

achievements.title: Liberator
achievements.description: WIN — slay the Eldritch Squid and free the trapped squids. Unlocks Leviathan.

achievements.title: Veteran Diver
achievements.description: Win 5 runs. Unlocks the Mustache.

achievements.title: Trench Lord
achievements.description: Win 10 runs. Unlocks the Golden Mustache.

achievements.title: Trench Sovereign
achievements.description: Win 25 runs. Unlocks the Diamond Mustache.

achievements.title: Trench Eternal
achievements.description: Win 50 runs.

achievements.title: The Midnight Drop
achievements.description: Reach depth 4 — face the Warden.

achievements.title: Slayer of the Maw
achievements.description: Reach the Maw at depth 8. Unlocks Voidborn.

achievements.title: Below the Maw
achievements.description: Pass the Maw into the Hadal Depths (depth 9). Unlocks Voidkin.

achievements.title: The Hollow Throne
achievements.description: Reach depth 11, the deepest dark. Unlocks Obsidian.

achievements.title: Giant Slayer
achievements.description: Defeat any boss creature. Unlocks the Pirate Hat.

achievements.title: Boss Breaker
achievements.description: Defeat 8 bosses (lifetime). Unlocks the Fancy Top Hat.

achievements.title: Titanbane
achievements.description: Defeat 25 bosses (lifetime). Unlocks the Specter skin.

achievements.title: Worldender
achievements.description: Defeat 50 bosses (lifetime).

achievements.title: Untouched
achievements.description: Win a run without taking a single hit.

achievements.title: Greed Rewarded
achievements.description: Win with a net point-loss modifier. Unlocks Gilded.

achievements.title: Comet Descent
achievements.description: Win in under 9 minutes. Unlocks Comet.

achievements.title: Lightspeed Descent
achievements.description: Win in under 6 minutes.

achievements.title: Thrill Seeker
achievements.description: Win with 3+ modifiers active. Unlocks War Paint.

achievements.title: Chaos Theory
achievements.description: Win with 5+ modifiers active.

achievements.title: Hell Survivor
achievements.description: Win a run on TERROR difficulty. Unlocks the Halo.

achievements.title: Immaculate
achievements.description: Win on TERROR without taking a single hit.

achievements.title: No Crutch
achievements.description: Win a run (not GOO-GOO BABY) without ever taking Lifesteal.

achievements.title: Trench Tycoon
achievements.description: Earn 5,000 $Things total. Unlocks the Trench Crown.

achievements.title: Trench Croesus
achievements.description: Earn 25,000 $Things total.

achievements.title: Tideworn
achievements.description: Play for 5 hours.

achievements.title: Unsinkable
achievements.description: Die 50 times and keep diving.

achievements.title: Godkiller
achievements.description: Slay the Churgly'nth in the fractalspace. Unlocks 3 cosmic relics.
